steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content: The condition ratio $x$ to $y$ is equivalent to ratio $12$ to $t$ translates to the equation: $$\frac{x}{y} = \frac{12}{t}$$ Substituting $x = 156$: $$\frac{156}{y} = \frac{12}{t}$$

steps.title: Cross-multiply and solve for y
steps.content: Cross-multiply: $$156t = 12y$$ Divide both sides by $12$: $$y = \frac{156t}{12} = 13t$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
